element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic fall, rotate, and placement mechanics established immediately
Introduced through basic single-player tower progression; blocks board space
Core competitive rule that allows players to counter and negate incoming garbage with own chains
Extension of Offsetting; allows sending Puyos back to opponent when countering
Erased adjacently with neighboring groups to add score and strengthen chains temporarily
Harder to erase than standard garbage; creates board control complications

typical_relief_triggers: Accumulating bonus points in Single Player mode
typical_tension_triggers: Board filling toward third column (loss condition)
Opponent chains building during countdown to garbage arrival
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based asynchronous tension with garbage arrival creating discrete stress moments; chains provide sustained builds; Offsetting mechanic enables longer matches with comeback potential

difficulty_curve.early_game: Battle tower Single Player mode features balanced chains doing less damage than predecessor, providing comeback opportunity for player learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of Point Puyos and Hard Puyos increases board management complexity; Offsetting mechanics become critical for survival against competent opponents
difficulty_curve.late_game: Endurance puzzle mode (Endless) and higher tower floors require mastery of chain timing, garbage management, and offensive overflow strategies
notable_spikes: First Offsetting encounter in versus play
Introduction of Hard Puyos requiring alternate clear strategies
Late-game tower opponents with rapid chaining ability

notable_level_patterns.description: Single Player story mode where Arle climbs tower, defeating opponents on each floor. Bonus points awarded as Experience. Designed with weaker chain balance than arcade version to allow player comeback mechanics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Super Famicom Single Puyo Puyo mode

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiplayer modes feature increasing garbage send rates. Offsetting mechanic creates defensive/offensive decision points. Five predefined rule sets available plus custom options
Endless Puyo Puyo mode with continuous escalating difficulty; tests pure chain-building and board management skills without story progression
